name: codex-hud
description: A local terminal HUD for Codex CLI subscription limit remaining usage.

interface.shortDescription: 实时查看 Codex CLI 订阅限额剩余量
interface.longDescription: Codex HUD reads local Codex telemetry to render a terminal dashboard for remaining 5-hour and weekly Codex subscription limits. It is inspired by claude-hud, but this local implementation uses Codex's local telemetry files and runs as a standalone terminal HUD.
defaultPrompt: 启动 Codex HUD 实时用量面板
查看当前 Codex 剩余额度
解释 Codex HUD 显示的字段
